claim_text: We used two DFDs based on natural images, LPIPS and the Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity index (DISTS),^28 which have been used as benchmark IQ metrics in large-scale computer vision IQ metric studies.

sub_claims.text: DISTS is a deep-feature-distance metric named 'Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity' based on natural images.

evidence.snippet: show that the resulting Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity (DISTS) index can be transformed into a proper metric in the mathematical sense.

Here, we develop the first full-reference image quality model with explicit tolerance to texture resampling. Using a convolutional neural network, we construct an injective and differentiable function that transforms images to multi-scale overcomplete representations.
Our method is constructed by first nonlinearly transforming images to a multi-scale overcomplete representation, using a variant of the VGG convolutional neural network (CNN).
VGG-based perceptual representation for the proposed DISTS

sub_claims.nuance: DISTS is explicitly defined in the paper as a full-reference IQA metric built on VGG-CNN deep feature representations, with weights optimized against human ratings of natural-image quality; matches the manuscript's 'DFD based on natural images' framing.

sub_claims.text: DISTS has been evaluated/benchmarked against other IQ metrics in large-scale image quality studies.

evidence.snippet: We compared DISTS against a set of full-reference IQA methods, including nine knowledge-driven models and three data-driven CNN-based models.
DISTS (ours) 0.954 0.954 0.811 0.928 0.929 0.767 0.855 0.830 0.639 — compared across LIVE, CSIQ, TID2013 against PSNR, SSIM, MS-SSIM, VSI, MAD, VIF, FSIMc, NLPD, GMSD, DeepIQA, PieAPP, LPIPS.
We also tested DISTS on BAPPS [7], a large-scale and highly-varied patch similarity dataset.
DISTS (ours) 0.772 0.822 0.797 0.710 0.600 0.627 0.625 0.651 0.689 — benchmarked against Human, PSNR, SSIM, MS-SSIM, VSI, MAD, VIF, FSIMc, NLPD, GMSD, DeepIQA, PieAPP, LPIPS.

sub_claims.nuance: The paper itself establishes DISTS as a benchmarked IQA metric on multiple standard databases (LIVE, CSIQ, TID2013) and the large-scale BAPPS patch-similarity dataset, explicitly compared head-to-head with thirteen other IQA metrics including LPIPS.

remediation.suggested_edit: No change required. The source introduces DISTS with the exact name used by the manuscript and benchmarks it against a broad battery of IQA metrics on large-scale datasets, fully supporting the 'benchmark IQ metric in large-scale computer vision IQ metric studies' framing.

phrasings_tried: Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity DISTS name/definition
DISTS benchmarked against IQA metrics on LIVE CSIQ TID2013
DISTS evaluated on BAPPS large-scale patch similarity dataset
DISTS comparison with LPIPS SSIM PSNR full-reference IQA
attestation.indirect_attribution_check: Ding et al. 2020 is the primary source that introduces and names DISTS; no indirect attribution concern.
attestation.out_of_context_check: The source's usage (full-reference IQA metric evaluated against other IQA metrics on natural-image quality databases) matches the manuscript's usage (DFD based on natural images, used as a benchmark IQ metric). No context mismatch.
